data.name: label2.Text
data.value: Set the color to be ignored as a cluster on the left and the color to be repainted on the right. Clicking on a cell in the grid, selected Excel cell color is reflected. White in left is ignored.

data.name: label1.Text
data.value: Set the recognized color as cluster for the left, and repainted color for the right. Clicking on a cell in the grid, selected Excel cell color is reflected. White in left is ignored.

data.name: label4.Text
data.value: Specify the color in cell with [Setting] button

data.name: label5.Text
data.value: Select the character string to be recognized as a cluster on the left and the cluster type to be set on the right.

data.name: nameRadioAbsUp.Text
data.value: Use a value of upper cell

data.name: nameRadioAbsLeft.Text
data.value: Use a value of left cell
